items.name: Gathered & Foraged
items.description: A seasonal six-course culinary journey crafted from the finest locally sourced ingredients. Optional curated wine pairing for $75. Full table participation requested.
items.simplified_description: A seasonal six-course meal made from local ingredients, with an optional wine pairing.

items.name: Vegetable Pave
items.description: Layered Vegetable & Potato Terrine, Preserved Herb Turnip Cream, Shaved Black Truffle
items.simplified_description: A layered dish of vegetables and potatoes with herb cream and truffle.

items.name: Cheese and Charcuterie
items.description: House-Cured Meats, Canadian Cheese, Accompaniments (Designed to Share)
items.simplified_description: A platter of cured meats and Canadian cheeses meant for sharing.

items.name: Velvet Celeriac Soup
items.description: Smoked Bacon, Poppy Seed Grissini, Ginger Garlic Crumb, Cold Pressed Canola Oil, Maple Cream
items.simplified_description: A creamy soup with smoked bacon and various toppings.

items.name: Grilled Radicchio & Kale Salad
items.description: Roasted Butternut Squash, Cranberry, Fermented Squash Vinaigrette (v)
items.simplified_description: A salad with grilled radicchio, kale, butternut squash, and a special vinaigrette.

items.name: Foie Gras Parfait
items.description: Notes of Garden Rhubarb, Brioche, Garden Blossoms
items.simplified_description: A rich parfait with flavors of rhubarb and served with brioche.

items.name: Noble Farms Bison Tartare
items.description: Charred Bison Rump, Nasturtium Aioli, Pickled Garlic Scape Flax Seed Cracker
items.simplified_description: Raw bison meat served with aioli and a flax seed cracker.

items.name: Salmon, Ricotta & Squid Ink Ravioli
items.description: Lemon Thyme Cream, Garlic Essence, Beet Juice and Salmon Roe
items.simplified_description: Ravioli filled with salmon and ricotta, served with a creamy sauce.

items.name: Layered & Pressed Game Hen
items.description: Savoury Cornbread Pudding, Caramelized Fennel, Mulled “Little Gem” Haskap Jus
items.simplified_description: A game hen dish served with cornbread pudding and a special sauce.

items.name: Lamb Ossobucco
items.description: Pomme Aligot, Roasted Beets, Marjoram Jus
items.simplified_description: Braised lamb shank served with creamy potatoes and roasted beets.

items.name: 28 Day Aged Beef Striploin
items.description: Braised Red Cabbage, Charred Shallots Two Ways, Truffle Fondant Potato
items.simplified_description: Aged beef striploin served with cabbage and truffle potatoes.

items.name: Seared Arctic Char
items.description: Lyonnaise Potato, Swiss Chard, Sumac Carrot Beurre Blanc
items.simplified_description: Seared fish served with potatoes and a creamy sauce.

items.name: Rabbit Saddle
items.description: Wild Mushroom Stuffed, Caramelized Brussels Sprouts, Parsnip Purée, Apple Balsamic and Mustard Sauce
items.simplified_description: Rabbit stuffed with mushrooms, served with Brussels sprouts and a sauce.

items.name: Vegan Lentil Sausage
items.description: Stewed Tomato and White Bean Cassoulet, Roasted Mushroom Reduction
items.simplified_description: A vegan sausage dish with beans and a mushroom sauce.

items.name: Chocolate Textures
items.description: Smoked Dark Chocolate Crémeux, Maple Whiskey Date Coulis, White Chocolate Espresso Cream, Hazelnut Florentine and Brownie
items.simplified_description: A dessert with various chocolate textures and flavors.

items.name: Apple Tart Tatin
items.description: Caramelized Apples, Laminated Pastry, Cinnamon Meringue, Pastry Cream and Apple Pearls
items.simplified_description: A caramelized apple tart with pastry and meringue.

items.name: Buckwheat Cookie Honey Cake
items.description: Burnt Honey Ganache, Roasted Pumpkin and Sumac Puree, Caramel Popcorn, Miso-Rum Ice Cream, Milk Waffle
items.simplified_description: A honey cake with various toppings including ice cream.

items.name: Canadian Cheese Tasting
items.description: A Selection of Artisan and Seasonal Accompaniments (v)
items.simplified_description: A tasting of various Canadian cheeses with accompaniments.
